entity.summary: Japanese centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by BTCBOX Co. Ltd. BTCBOX is one of Japan's older domestic crypto exchanges and remains listed in current exchange directories and Japanese crypto-asset exchange registration materials, so HEI classifies it as active.
entity.notes: Launch date is stored at month precision from exchange-profile sources. Regulatory registration confirms continuing Japanese exchange identity but is not treated as a launch event.

events.title: BTCBOX began operating in Japan
events.description: BTCBOX began operating as a Japanese cryptocurrency exchange in March 2014.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker from exchange profiles and company materials.

evidence.title: BTCBOX exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile identifies BTCBOX as a Japan-based exchange launched in 2014.

evidence.title: BTCBOX company and service website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website confirms the operating exchange identity.
